name: Sweet and Sour Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 pound lean pork, cut into 3/4-inch cubes
1 can pineapple chunks in juice, drain and reserve juice
3 tablespoons pineapple juice from reserved juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip pork cubes in beaten egg and then in flour, coating well.
2. Fry pork in hot peanut oil (360°F) until brown, about 8 minutes. Remove and drain on paper towel; keep warm.
3. In a wok or deep skillet, combine sugar, vinegar, pineapple juice, and soy sauce; bring to boiling.
4. Blend cornstarch into juice; gradually stir into sauce. Continue to simmer sauce, stirring constantly until it thickens.
5. Stir the warm deep-fried pork cubes, drained pineapple chunks, and pepper slices into the thickened sauce. Heat mixture thoroughly, stirring constantly for about 5 minutes.
